packetManifest.title: Shannon (1948) source packet — worked example
packetManifest.scope: Represents the foundational information-theory paper as a single source. Does not cover surrounding literature or derivations.

provenance.origin: Bell System Technical Journal via public DOI resolver
provenance.method: manual capture from DOI landing page

onAccept: Record the packet id and schemaVersion.
Record the capturedAt timestamp of the source contract.
Record the evidenceGrade as stated; do not upgrade it.
onReject: Record the packet id and the reason for rejection.
Record which required field or check failed.
onCite: Cite the underlying source, not the packet, in derivative work.
Mark the packet posture as candidate in any derivative artifact.
